# PayFast Docs

> @bazileros/payfast Convex component for the PayFast South African payment gateway. One-time payments, subscriptions, tokenized charges, refunds, and ITN webhook processing.

## Getting Started

- [Overview](/payfast/): Architecture, features, and quick start
- [Installation](/payfast/installation): Step-by-step setup guide with environment variables

## Guides

- [One-time Payments](/payfast/checkout): Form redirect payments with usePayfastCheckout
- [Subscriptions](/payfast/subscriptions): Recurring billing management
- [ITN Webhooks](/payfast/itn-webhooks): Echo-back validation and event handlers

## Reference

- [React Hooks](/payfast/react-hooks): API reference for usePayfastCheckout, useTransactions, useSubscriptions, useSubscriptionActions
- [Server-side API](/payfast/server-side): Payfast class with typed wrapper methods
- [Best Practices](/payfast/best-practices): Security, idempotency, monorepo tips

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/bazileros/payfastt): Source code and issue tracker
- [PayFast Documentation](https://developers.payfast.co.za/docs): Official PayFast integration guide
- [PayFast Sandbox](https://sandbox.payfast.co.za): Test environment
